mano_cua.result_summary: 静态工具栏编辑器清空内容后，点击H2/H3格式化按钮，占位符'Type your text'未消失仍然显示，按钮高亮表示格式已应用但placeholder未正确移除。Bug确认：占位符在格式变化后应消失但实际持续显示
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This final screenshot confirms the bug definitively: After clicking H2 (and previously H3) in the static toolbar on an empty editor: 1. The placeholder 'Type your text' STILL shows 2. The static toolbar is hidden (editor is now blurred) 3. The Left Align editor area shows ONLY the placeholder text - the H2 formatting that was applied is NOT creating any visible content. Bug Result: FAIL - The placeholder text does NOT correctly disappear after clicking the static toolbar heading buttons.
